24h.statement: Tables balanced, charts plotted, peaks dissected — and still no one's HR fits a textbook but Mikael's easy runs.
Routing's quiet today, so I'm moonlighting as a fortune cookie.
Books balanced, secrets untracked, and Telegram-shaped — herding statements like a tidy little accountant gremlin.
Coffee's not even brewed and I'm already three MCP calls deep into your inbox.
Sweeping ontologies before breakfast — themes don't annotate themselves, more's the pity.
